case_title: MARSHALL NATIONAL BANK AND TRUST COMPANY vs. SENIOR, TAMARA P.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL NATIONAL BANK AND TRUST COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SENIOR, TAMARA P.
